data.title: Panamanian court nullifies  contract from Hong Kong firm for the canal; a win for Trump and a setback for CK Hutchison.
data.description: The recent ruling represents a win for President Trump, as he has expressed a desire for the U.S. to have control over the canal. However, it is a setback for CK Hutchison, the ports operator involved in the decision.

data.title: Edelson Lechtzin LLP investigating data breach at CFD Investments Inc. Data compromised on or about March 15, 2025.
data.description: Edelson Lechtzin LLP, a renowned national law firm specializing in class action lawsuits, is currently looking into allegations of data privacy violations related to an incident at CFD Investments, Inc. (CFD). The breach was discovered by CFD around March 15, 2025, and potentially exposed sensitive information. Individuals affected by this breach are encouraged to reach out to explore their legal options.

data.title: Crescent Real Estate LLC in Texas promotes 3 leaders and hires 1, including Tony Click to Senior VP, Leasing.
data.description: Fort Worth, Texas - On January 30, 2026, Crescent Real Estate LLC revealed the advancement of three key individuals within the company and the recruitment of a new member to its team. Tony Click has been promoted to the position of Senior Vice President, Leasing, while Valeria Caso Hatley has taken on the role of Vice President, Deputy General Counsel. Additionally, the company has welcomed a new hire, bringing the total number of recent changes in leadership to four.

data.title: ResMed beats Q2 earnings with $2.81 per share, sales of $1.42 billion; FDA clears PTCS for Smart Comfort launch in early 2026.
data.description: ResMed Inc., a company listed on the NYSE under the ticker RMD, recently announced their adjusted earnings for the second quarter of fiscal 2026 at $2.81 per share, surpassing expectations set at $2.72 per share. Their quarterly sales also saw a notable 11% year-over-year increase to $1.42 billion, exceeding the anticipated $1.396 billion. These figures represent a 9% surge in sales on a constant currency basis, primarily fueled by heightened demand for their range of sleep devices, masks, and accessories. The revenue from Residential Care Software witnessed a 5% uptick on a constant currency basis. In a major development from December 2025, the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) provided clearance for ResMed's Personalized Therapy Comfort Settings (PTCS), now known as Smart Comfort, making it the first FDA-cleared AI-enabled medical device designed to offer tailored comfort settings for patients dealing with obstructive sleep apnea (OSA) as they initiate and continue CPAP therapy. The Smart Comfort is slated for an early 2026 launch in a limited U.S. beta version dedicated to new users of the myAir app, a consumer sleep companion application by ResMed, in conjunction with the ResMed AirSense 11.

data.title: Gregg Metcalf becomes Executive Director at Cushman & Wakefield in Atlanta.
data.description: Atlanta-based real estate company Cushman & Wakefield welcomed Gregg Metcalf as their new Executive Director. The announcement was made today, marking Metcalf's official entry into the firm.

data.title: Abcourt Mines Inc. closes US$30M senior debt financing and offtake agreement with Glencore for Sleeping Giant mine.
data.description: Abcourt Mines Inc. has successfully finalized a transaction with Glencore AG on January 30, 2026, involving a senior secured debenture worth up to US$30 million. This deal, which was disclosed on December 22, 2025, also includes additional agreements such as an offtake agreement covering all outputs from Abcourt’s Sleeping Giant mine. Abcourt’s stock trades on the TSX Venture under the ticker ABI and on the OTCQB under ABMBF.

data.title: Prometheum secures $23M for U.S. digital markets expansion, attracting high-net-worth investors, boosting confidence.
data.description: Prometheum Inc., a digital asset market infrastructure provider, has recently raised $23 million from high-net-worth investors and institutions in 2025. This funding exemplifies the sustained investor trust in Prometheum's efforts to develop advanced market infrastructure for the U.S. capital markets. The secured capital will aid in Prometheum's commercial expansion as it introduces digital asset products and services.

data.title: Charlotte companies excelled on stock market; CNBC named city No. 1 in 2025. Region highlighted as corporate powerhouse.
data.description: In Charlotte, North Carolina, it was revealed in a recent report dated January 30, 2026, that companies based in this city took the lead in the stock market throughout the previous year. This information was supported by new data from the Charlotte Regional Business Alliance, shedding light on the factors contributing to the region's success. CNBC also recognized Charlotte in early January as the top city for 2025, showcasing the city's economic prowess.

data.title: DTE Energy to release full year 2025 earnings on Feb. 17, 2026 before market opens, conference call at 9:00 a.m. ET.
data.description: On January 30, 2026, it was reported that DTE Energy (NYSE:DTE) is set to reveal its complete financial performance for the year 2025 on Tuesday, February 17, 2026, before the market opens. The company will host a conference call at 9:00 a.m. ET on the same day to delve into the earnings report. This disclosure will be of interest to investors, the media, and other stakeholders.

data.title: Beam AI reveals new AI HVAC takeoff software at AHR Expo 2026, offering full-scope takeoff in under 10 minutes, saving hours estimating.
data.description: Yesterday in Las Vegas, Beam AI introduced its new AI HVAC takeoff software at the AHR Expo. This innovative tool enables estimators to complete a comprehensive HVAC takeoff in less than 10 minutes, a process that previously took several hours. The software is set to revolutionize the estimating process and streamline workflows for professionals in the industry.

data.title: Britain seeks growth by partnering with China; PM Keir Starmer secures visa deals, Scotch whisky sales, and vows to strengthen relations.
data.description: In the midst of tariffs and trade tensions, Prime Minister Keir Starmer led a group of British business leaders to China where they secured agreements on visas and Scotch whisky, along with commitments to strengthen connections. This move comes as a strategic response to the challenging economic landscape, signaling a proactive effort to enhance business relationships.

data.title: Zilliz releases Bilingual Semantic Highlighting Model to reduce RAG token costs and improve accuracy.
data.description: A tech company based in REDWOOD CITY, Zilliz, revealed the launch of its Bilingual Semantic Highlighting Model. The Model, introduced on Jan. 30, 2026, is the first of its kind in the industry and aims to cut down token usage significantly. Zilliz, known for the popular open-source vector database Milvus, is making this AI model available for public use as open-source software.
